name: Icon Button
description: A button that displays only an icon, with an accessible label.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant controlling border, background, and text styles.

props.name: size
props.description: Button size controlling dimensions and icon scaling.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Color scheme override. When unset, the variant's default color is used.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for the icon-only button (required for screen readers).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and apply dimmed styling.

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a spinner and disable interaction.
